signIn.heroHeading: Your restaurant, in the hands of the right guests.
signIn.heroBody: Manage reservations, private requests and your team in one place.
signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Access your restaurant dashboard.
signIn.notPartnerHint: Not a partner yet? You need an invitation from the Tavli team.
signIn.recoveryHint: Using a recovery code will disable your authenticator. You can set up a new one after signing in.

signUp.heroHeading: Put your restaurant in front of the right guests.
signUp.heroBody: Start with a 3-month trial. Set up in minutes.
signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.taxIdHint: You can add it later, before billing.
signUp.trialNotice: You start with a 3-month trial. No charges now.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email address
verifyEmail.bodySent: We have sent you a confirmation link. Open it to activate your account, then sign in.
verifyEmail.bodyDefault: Your account needs its email address confirmed. Check your inbox for the confirmation link.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: We have resent the email. Check your inbox.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.challengeFailed: We could not issue the challenge. Please try again.
errors.notPartnerAccount: This account is not a partner account.
errors.signUpConflict: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
errors.signUpRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.signUpTrialUsed: This tax ID has already used a trial. Write to us for help.
errors.signUpTaxIdClaimed: This tax ID is already claimed by another organisation.
errors.signUpInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.signUpGeneric: We could not create the account.
errors.resendRateLimited: You have requested too many links. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.resendSendFailed: We could not resend the email. Please try again.

landing.introRest: . You'll set up your profile, opening hours, photos and menu in a few minutes.
landing.expiredBody: Invitation links are valid for 14 days. Ask your Tavli contact for a new one.
landing.claimedBody: This invitation has already been used. If you want to access the partner dashboard, sign in at /partner/sign-in.
landing.revokedBody: This invitation is no longer active. Contact the Tavli team if you think this is a mistake.
landing.notFoundBody: This link isn't recognised. It may have been mistyped — copy and paste the full address from the email.
landing.configMissingBody: Tavli is still being set up. Try again in a few minutes or get in touch if the problem persists.

account.title: Create your account
account.subtitle: A single account is all you need. We use this address for reservation alerts and important platform announcements.
account.emailHint: It must be the same address the invitation was sent to.
account.terms: By continuing, you agree to the Tavli partner terms and to our privacy policy.

profile.title: Tell us about your restaurant
profile.subtitle: This basic information appears on your page and your menu. You can change it any time from the partner dashboard.
profile.heroNotePlaceholder: Recipes from grandma, in the heart of the Old Town.
profile.heroNoteHint: Appears as the italic line on your menu. Up to 160 characters.
profile.submit: Save and continue to opening hours

hours.title: When are you open?
hours.subtitle: Set your weekly opening hours. You can change them any time — and you can add exceptions for special days later from the dashboard.

photos.title: Add a few photos
photos.subtitle: One main photo plus a few for the gallery are enough for now. You can add more any time from the dashboard. Mark your best photo as the main one — it's the first thing guests see.

menu.title: Your menu, your way
menu.subtitle: You can add your menu right now or skip this step and use the full editor in the dashboard — most partners skip it and complete it later.
menu.cardBody: The partner menu editor lets you create sections, add dishes with photos, mark vegetarian / gluten-free / spicy and highlight the chef's recommendations — all with autosave.
menu.cardNote: During the beta, the editor ships with the partner dashboard (M10). Your page can be published without a menu — guests will see “Menu coming soon” on your restaurant page.

review.title: Ready to launch?
review.subtitlePrefix: This is how your restaurant will look to guests. Press Publish and you'll appear in

policyDisclosure.title: About reviews on Tavli
policyDisclosure.body: After guests dine at your restaurant, we ask them for a rating with a single tap. Reviews are tied to a real reservation on Tavli — verified, not anonymous strangers. We don't delete or edit reviews. You'll be able to reply publicly to every review (coming soon).

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.passwordPwned: This password has appeared in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
errors.invitationEmailMismatch: This invitation was sent to {email}. Please use that email.
errors.autoSignInFailed: Account created but auto-sign-in failed: {message}. Try /partner/sign-in.
errors.noRestaurantFound: No restaurant found for your account.
errors.phoneInvalid: Phone number is invalid. Please include the country code.
errors.atLeastOneDayOpen: At least one day must be open.
errors.noRestaurantLinked: No restaurant linked to this account.
errors.profileIncomplete: Profile isn't complete. Go back and fill in name, cuisines, and address.
errors.hoursNotSet: Hours aren't set. Go back to the Hours step.
